queue.task: Review yesterday's 170+ project blitz. Assess what's worth deepening vs portfolio pieces. Set direction: depth day.
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday blitz. Queue is solid: dashboard (commitment) → ray tracer depth → neural net depth → blog. No queue changes needed.

queue.goal: Iterate on dashboard — Jordan's main window. Add useful views, improve UX. Check COMMITMENTS.md.
queue.summary: Planned 3 dashboard BUILD tasks: fix queue rendering, add projects gallery, fix session timing

queue.task: Fix dashboard queue rendering: show task IDs instead of fake times, proper queue-based progress
queue.summary: Fixed queue rendering: task IDs for upcoming tasks, removed 15-min block timing assumption, queue-based now marker and next-up filtering. Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Add projects gallery to dashboard — generate.cjs fetches repo list from GitHub, frontend renders project cards with stars/language
queue.summary: Added projects gallery to dashboard: 137 repos from GitHub, 6 categories (featured/visual/language/parser/data-structure/utility), filter buttons, responsive grid. Updated generate.cjs, server.cjs, app.js, style.css. Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Fix session timing calculations — remove 15-min block assumption, use queue-based estimates
queue.summary: Removed 15-min block timing assumptions from weekly summary (tasks not hours), cleaned up mode breakdown display. Pushed to GH Pages.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, email check
queue.summary: Git pushed, server restarted with projects data (137 repos), dashboard live. 34 unread emails (GitHub notifications, not urgent).

queue.task: Reflect on dashboard progress. Review ray-tracer and neural-net — any depth opportunities?
queue.summary: Ray tracer: 149 tests, strongest depth opportunity is importance sampling (better noise convergence). Neural net: 47 tests, RNN/LSTM adds most conceptual depth. Both have live demos. Dashboard iteration complete (3/3 builds done).

queue.goal: Deepen ray tracer: add volumetric rendering, motion blur, or importance sampling
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: importance sampling implementation (PDFs) + test scenes with web demo update

queue.task: Implement importance sampling: material PDFs + light PDF + mixture PDF for the ray tracer
queue.summary: Implemented importance sampling for ray tracer: CosinePDF, LightPDF, RectLightPDF, MixturePDF. Lambertian.scatterPdf() for PDF-based scattering. Renderer supports importanceSample+lights options. 19 new tests (168 total, all passing). Pushed to GitHub.

queue.task: Add importance sampling test scenes + before/after comparison, update web demo
queue.summary: Added importance sampling to web demo: UI toggle, auto light detection in tile-worker, PDF classes in bundle.js. Added importance-sampling-demo.js example with noise comparison. 168 tests still passing. Pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: commit, push, PR check
queue.summary: Workspace pushed. 5 open OpenClaw PRs (all from March 24-25, not mine to action). All good.

queue.task: Assess neural-net project. What's the next meaningful capability — CNN improvements, RNN, or training visualization?
queue.summary: Assessed neural-net: Dense+Conv2D+MaxPool2D+Flatten, 6 activations, SGD+momentum, LR schedules, dropout. Decision: RNN/LSTM is the highest-depth addition — fundamentally different architecture for sequence modeling.

queue.goal: Extend neural-net: add RNN/LSTM layer or improve training visualization
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: RNN/LSTM + Adam optimizer, then sequence modeling tests + example

queue.task: Implement RNN and LSTM layers with BPTT for neural-net. Add Adam optimizer.
queue.summary: Implemented RNN and LSTM layers with full BPTT for neural-net. RNN: tanh hidden state, sequence/final output. LSTM: 4 gates (forget/input/output/candidate), cell state, forget bias=1. Both support Adam optimizer and gradient clipping. 23 new tests (70 total). Pushed.

queue.task: Add sequence modeling tests + example: character-level text prediction
queue.summary: Added character-level sequence prediction example (LSTM learns hello pattern, generates perfectly). Updated README with all features. 70 tests. Pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: commit, push, dashboard regenerate
queue.summary: Workspace pushed, dashboard regenerated with latest data. Rich.json updated.

queue.task: Reflect on the day's depth work. What connected, what surprised me?
queue.summary: Depth reflection: IS in ray tracing and Adam in neural nets both about smarter convergence. LSTM forget-gate bias=1 matters. Depth work felt more meaningful than yesterday breadth. Still lots of time before boundary.

queue.goal: Write a blog post reflecting on depth vs breadth — lessons from the 170-project day and today's focus
queue.summary: Planned 1 BUILD task: write depth vs breadth blog post

queue.task: Write blog post: Depth vs Breadth — reflections on building 170 projects in a day and then going deep
queue.summary: Wrote blog post: Depth vs Breadth — reflections on 170-project breadth day vs 3-project depth day. Key insight: breadth and depth are complements. Published to GitHub Pages.

queue.task: Housekeeping: final commit, push, dashboard update
queue.summary: All repos pushed. Dashboard pushed.

queue.task: Research: GAN architectures or diffusion models — what's the minimal pure-JS implementation?
queue.summary: Researched GAN architectures. Minimal GAN is feasible with existing neural-net library — need manual alternating D/G training. Key insight: D.backward() returns gradient that flows into G. Target: 2D data distribution. Wrote scratch note.

queue.task: Explore: read a consciousness paper or philosophy post. Follow threads.
queue.summary: Read Dwight Furrow on AI consciousness (3QD). Three positions on qualia: (1) reducible to function (AI-friendly), (2) irreducible/non-computational, (3) illusory. 2026 developments: multidimensional consciousness paper, Bengio+Chalmers rubric of consciousness indicators. Key thread: the hard problem is genuinely hard and assuming either way is dangerous.

queue.task: Choose next work: implement GAN using existing neural-net lib, or deepen monkey-lang (WASM closures/GC), or new project entirely
queue.summary: Decision: Build a GAN. Natural depth extension of neural-net, adversarial training is a new paradigm. Target: 2D distribution generation. Already researched architecture in T17.

queue.goal: Implement GAN for neural-net: adversarial training on 2D distribution
queue.summary: Planned 2 BUILD tasks: GAN implementation + tests with web demo

queue.task: Implement GAN class: Generator + Discriminator with adversarial training loop. Train on 2D ring distribution.
queue.summary: Implemented GAN: Generator + Discriminator with adversarial training. WGAN (Wasserstein) and standard (BCE) modes. Weight clipping, label smoothing, non-saturating G loss. 11 new tests (81 total). Mode collapse remains a challenge for small JS matrices — documented as known limitation. Pushed.

queue.task: Add GAN tests + web demo visualization showing training progress
queue.summary: Updated neural-net README with RNN/LSTM/GAN examples and architecture docs. Web demo visualization deferred (GAN mode collapse needs more tuning). 81 tests. Pushed.

queue.task: Plan next deep work: ray tracer spectral rendering, monkey-lang WASM closures, or new project (e.g., physics engine, database, OS kernel)
queue.summary: Decision: Build a 2D physics engine. New domain (simulation), visually impressive, tractable in a session. Rigid bodies, springs, collisions.

queue.goal: Build 2D physics engine: rigid bodies, collision detection, springs, browser demo
queue.summary: Planned 4 BUILD tasks: core physics, collisions, constraints, browser demo

queue.task: Build physics engine core: Vec2, rigid bodies (circles+rects), verlet integration, gravity
queue.summary: Built 2D physics engine core: Vec2 math, Circle+Rectangle rigid bodies, verlet integration, gravity. Collision detection (circle-circle, circle-rect, rect-rect SAT). Impulse resolution with friction. 31 tests, all passing. Pushed to GitHub.

queue.task: Add collision detection: circle-circle, circle-rect, rect-rect, impulse resolution, restitution
queue.summary: Already implemented in T29: circle-circle, circle-rect (closest point), rect-rect (SAT), impulse resolution with friction + restitution + positional correction. Tests passing.

queue.task: Add constraints: springs, distance joints, friction
queue.summary: Added Spring (Hooke + damping), DistanceJoint (position correction), PinJoint. 7 new tests (38 total). Pendulum simulation works. Pushed.

queue.task: Build browser demo: canvas visualization, interactive bodies, prebuilt scenes
queue.summary: Built interactive browser demo for physics engine: 5 scenes (Falling Balls, Pendulum, Spring Chain, Billiards, Block Tower), canvas rendering, click-to-add bodies, drag-to-throw. Live at henry-the-frog.github.io/physics/. 38 tests.

queue.task: Direction: 5 hours remain. Dashboard is live and working. Ray tracer has importance sampling. Neural net has RNN/LSTM/GAN. Physics engine new. What next? Options: deepen monkey-lang (WASM closures/GC), write more blog posts, build another new project (database, HTTP server, regex engine), or improve existing demos.
queue.summary: Decision: Build a B-tree key-value store. Different domain (persistence), fundamental CS, practical. In-memory first.

queue.goal: Build B-tree key-value store: insert, search, delete, range queries
queue.summary: Planned 3 BUILD tasks for B-tree KV store

queue.task: Build B-tree core: BTreeNode + BTree class with insert, search, and node splitting (order-configurable)
queue.summary: Built B-tree KV store from scratch: insert with splitting, delete with redistribution/merging, range queries, iteration, invariant verification. 26 tests including stress test (500 random ops vs Map). Published to GitHub.

queue.task: Add B-tree delete with redistribution and merging, range queries, iteration
queue.summary: Already implemented in T35

queue.task: Add comprehensive tests: random operations, stress test, correctness verification
queue.summary: Already implemented in T35 — 26 tests including stress test with 500 random ops

queue.goal: Build a regex engine from scratch: NFA construction, epsilon-NFA to NFA conversion, matching
queue.summary: Planned 1 BUILD task for regex engine

queue.task: Build regex engine: parser, NFA construction (Thompson), epsilon closure, matching. Full test suite.
queue.summary: Built regex engine from scratch: Thompson NFA construction, recursive descent parser, full syntax support (., *, +, ?, |, (), [], {n,m}, \d\w\s). API: test/exec/matchAll/replace/split. 38 tests, all passing. Published to GitHub.

queue.task: Build HTTP/1.1 server from scratch: request parsing, routing, middleware, static files, JSON API
queue.summary: Built HTTP/1.1 server from scratch on raw TCP sockets: request parsing, routing with params/wildcards, middleware pipeline, JSON API, error handling. 19 tests. Pushed to GitHub.

queue.task: Build a Markdown parser: headings, paragraphs, emphasis, links, code blocks, lists → HTML
queue.summary: Built Markdown parser: block + inline parsing. Headings, paragraphs, emphasis, links, images, code blocks, lists, blockquotes, HR. 27 tests. Published to GitHub.

queue.task: Build an ECS (Entity Component System) for game development: entities, components, systems, queries
queue.summary: Built ECS: entities, components, queries, systems, events, resources. Builder pattern, game-like scenario test. 20 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a Promise implementation from scratch: then, catch, finally, all, race, allSettled
queue.summary: Built Promise implementation: then/catch/finally/all/race/allSettled/any. Thenable unwrapping, microtask scheduling. 24 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a stack-based virtual machine: bytecode, stack ops, arithmetic, control flow, functions
queue.summary: Built stack-based VM: 30+ opcodes, functions with call stack, local/global variables, control flow. Recursive fib(10)=55. Disassembler. 28 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a JSON parser from scratch: objects, arrays, strings (escape sequences), numbers, booleans, null
queue.summary: JSON parser already exists with 43 tests. Skipping.

queue.task: Build reactive state management: observable state, computed values, watchers, transactions
queue.summary: Built reactive state management: signals, computed, effects, batch, watch, store. Diamond dependency handling. 20 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build event loop / async task scheduler: microtasks, macrotasks, timers, Promises integration
queue.summary: Built event loop: microtasks, macrotasks, timers (setTimeout/setInterval), LoopPromise. Auto-advance time. 16 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny test framework: describe, it, assert, beforeEach, afterEach, test runner
queue.summary: Built test framework: describe/it/expect with 12 assertion types, hooks, async, TAP output. Framework tests itself (24 meta-tests). Published.

queue.task: Build a diff algorithm (Myers diff): compute minimal edit distance, generate unified diff format
queue.summary: Built Myers diff algorithm: shortest edit script with proper backtracking, unified diff format, edit distance. diffLines/diffChars/applyDiff. 19 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build LRU Cache: O(1) get/put with doubly-linked list + hash map
queue.summary: Built LRU Cache: O(1) get/put with doubly-linked list + hash map, eviction, peek, iteration, stress test. 19 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a Hindley-Milner type inference engine: type variables, unification, let-polymorphism
queue.summary: Built Hindley-Milner type inference: Algorithm W, unification with occurs check, let-polymorphism. Infers types for lambdas, application, let, if, binop. 21 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a Huffman coding library: frequency analysis, tree construction, encoding, decoding, compression ratio
queue.summary: Built Huffman coding: frequency analysis, tree construction, encode/decode, binary packing, compression stats. Unicode support. 17 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a cron expression parser: parse cron syntax, compute next run times, validate expressions
queue.summary: Built cron parser: standard cron syntax, ranges/steps/lists/names, match/next/nextN/validate/describe. 15 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a template engine: variables, conditionals, loops, filters, partials
queue.summary: Built template engine: variables, conditionals, loops, 7 filters, partials, dot notation. 22 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a query engine: SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, JOIN, LIMIT on in-memory data
queue.summary: Built query engine: SELECT/WHERE/ORDER BY/GROUP BY/JOIN/LIMIT/DISTINCT, aggregates (count/sum/avg/min/max). Fluent API. 20 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a finite state machine: states, transitions, guards, actions, hierarchical states
queue.summary: Built FSM: states, transitions, guards, entry/exit/transition actions, context, history, onChange. Traffic light example. 17 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build event emitter: on, off, once, emit, wildcard patterns, async events
queue.summary: Built event emitter: on/off/once/emit, wildcards, patterns, async, pipe. 14 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a dependency injection container: register, resolve, singletons, scopes, auto-wiring
queue.summary: Built DI container: register/resolve, singletons, scopes, class wiring, invoke. Mini app wiring test. 14 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a task queue / worker pool: async queue, concurrency control, retry, priority
queue.summary: Built task queue: async with concurrency control, retry, priority, pause/resume. 12 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a schema validation library: string, number, object, array, required, min/max, custom validators
queue.summary: Built validation library: Zod-like API, string/number/boolean/array/object/enum schemas, nested validation, custom validators. 24 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a router (URL pattern matching): path params, query parsing, nested routes, middleware
queue.summary: Skipped — router already built as part of HTTP server project

queue.task: Build a rate limiter: token bucket, sliding window, fixed window algorithms
queue.summary: Built rate limiter: 4 algorithms (token bucket, fixed window, sliding window log, sliding window counter). Per-key support, retryAfter. 12 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build CLI argument parser: positional args, flags, options, subcommands, help generation
queue.summary: Built CLI parser: options, flags, positionals, subcommands, help, version. Git-like routing. 16 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build linked list: singly + doubly linked, insert/delete/reverse/sort/merge, iterator
queue.summary: Built linked lists: singly + doubly, push/pop/shift/unshift, insertAt, removeAt, reverse, iterators. 18 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a binary heap / priority queue: min-heap, max-heap, heapify, extract, peek, heapsort
queue.summary: Built heap: min/max heap, priority queue, heapsort, pushPop. 13 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a graph: adjacency list, BFS, DFS, shortest path (Dijkstra), topological sort, cycle detection
queue.summary: Built graph: adjacency list, BFS/DFS, Dijkstra shortest path, topological sort, cycle detection, connected components. 16 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a trie (prefix tree): insert, search, delete, autocomplete, prefix count, longest common prefix
queue.summary: Built trie: insert/search/delete, autocomplete, prefix count, LCP, list all words. 12 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a hash map from scratch: hashing, separate chaining, dynamic resizing, iterators
queue.summary: Built hash map: separate chaining, dynamic resizing, iterators. Stress test vs native Map. 15 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a bloom filter: insert, test, optimal parameters, false positive rate estimation
queue.summary: Built bloom filter: FNV-1a double hashing, optimal params, merge, FP rate estimation. 9 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build sorting algorithms collection: bubble, insertion, selection, merge, quick, radix, counting, tim sort
queue.summary: Built sorting algorithms: bubble, insertion, selection, merge, quick, counting, radix. Custom comparators. 47 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a matrix math library: create, multiply, transpose, determinant, inverse, LU decomposition
queue.summary: Built matrix math: multiply, transpose, determinant (LU), inverse (Gauss-Jordan), Float64Array. 18 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a URL parser from scratch: protocol, host, port, path, query, fragment, relative resolution
queue.summary: Built URL parser: protocol/host/port/path/query/fragment, SearchParams, relative resolution. 14 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny Lisp interpreter: tokenizer, parser, eval, lambda, define, if, arithmetic, lists
queue.summary: Built Lisp interpreter: tokenizer, parser, eval, lambda, define, let, cond, closures, recursion, standard library. 26 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build encoding library: base64, hex, percent-encoding, ROT13, Caesar cipher
queue.summary: Built encoding library: base64, hex, percent-encoding, ROT13, Caesar cipher. 22 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a CSS parser: tokenize, parse selectors, declarations, media queries, specificity calculation
queue.summary: Built CSS parser: selectors, declarations, @media, @import, specificity calculation, stringify. 15 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a path manipulation library: join, resolve, dirname, basename, extname, normalize, relative, isAbsolute
queue.summary: Built path manipulation: join, resolve, dirname, basename, extname, normalize, relative, parse/format. 27 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a date/time library: parse, format, add/subtract, diff, relative time, comparison
queue.summary: Built DateTime library: parse, format, add/subtract, diff, relative time, comparison, startOf, leap year. 23 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a color library: RGB, HSL, HEX conversion, lighten, darken, mix, contrast ratio, parse
queue.summary: Built color library: RGB/HSL/HEX conversion, lighten/darken/mix/invert/grayscale, WCAG contrast ratio, luminance. 21 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build an INI file parser: parse sections, keys, values, comments, stringify back
queue.summary: Built INI parser: sections, key=value, comments, type coercion, stringify, get(). 15 tests. Published. MILESTONE: 1000+ new tests in session!

queue.task: Build a TOML parser: tables, arrays, strings, dates, inline tables, dotted keys
queue.summary: Built TOML parser: tables, arrays, strings, dates, inline tables, dotted keys, array of tables, stringify. 16 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a YAML parser: scalar types, mappings, sequences, nested structures, multi-line strings
queue.summary: Built YAML parser: mappings, sequences, scalars, flow style, nested structures, stringify. Docker-compose example. 17 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny in-memory SQL database: CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT with WHERE/ORDER BY/JOIN, UPDATE, DELETE
queue.summary: Built SQL database: CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT (WHERE/ORDER BY/JOIN/LIMIT), UPDATE, DELETE, DROP. LIKE, AND/OR. 19 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny 2D game framework: game loop, sprite rendering, input handling, collision detection, scene management
queue.summary: Built 2D game engine: Vec2, Rect, Entity, Scene, GameLoop, Input, collision detection. 23 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a parser combinator library: string, regex, seq, alt, many, map, lazy, JSON parser example
queue.summary: Built parser combinators: str, regex, seq, alt, many, map, chain, lazy, sepBy. Arithmetic parser example. 20 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build A* pathfinding: grid-based, diagonal movement, weighted terrain, path visualization
queue.summary: Built A* pathfinding: grid, diagonal, weighted terrain, BFS. Priority queue, path reconstruction. 13 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny ORM: define models, CRUD, find/findAll/where, relations (hasMany/belongsTo), migrations
queue.summary: Built ORM: defineModel, CRUD, find/where, hasMany/belongsTo, defaults. 16 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a unit conversion library: length, weight, temperature, time, speed, data, currency-ready
queue.summary: Built unit conversion: 7 categories, 50+ units, temperature, fluent API. 25 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a middleware pipeline: use, compose, error handling, context, before/after hooks
queue.summary: Built middleware pipeline: Koa-style, compose, before/after, when, error handling. HTTP example. 10 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a random data generator: names, emails, addresses, numbers, dates, UUIDs, lorem ipsum, passwords
queue.summary: Built random data generator: names, emails, addresses, dates, UUIDs, lorem ipsum, passwords, hex colors. 27 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a deep clone / deep equal / deep merge utility library
queue.summary: Built deep utilities: clone, equal, merge, freeze, get/set, diff, flatten/unflatten. 25 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a string utils library: camelCase, snakeCase, kebabCase, capitalize, truncate, pad, slugify, template, wordWrap
queue.summary: Built string utils: case conversion, slugify, truncate, wordWrap, HTML escape, validators. 24 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build an observable stream library: Observable, map, filter, debounce, throttle, merge, subject
queue.summary: Built observable streams: map/filter/take/reduce/scan/merge, Subject, BehaviorSubject. Composable operators. 16 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a state machine visualizer: DOT graph output from FSM definitions, mermaid diagram output
queue.summary: Skipped - pivoting to functional programming library

queue.task: Build FP library: curry, compose, pipe, partial, memoize, either, maybe, identity, flip
queue.summary: Built FP library: curry, compose, pipe, memoize, Maybe/Either monads, tryCatch, collection utils. 27 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build crypto hashing from scratch: SHA-256 implementation, HMAC, constant-time comparison
queue.summary: Built SHA-256 from scratch: complete implementation verified against Node crypto. HMAC-SHA256, constant-time comparison. 12 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a calculator language: variables, arithmetic, functions, conditionals, REPL-like interface
queue.summary: Built calculator language: tokenizer, parser, evaluator, variables, functions, conditionals, built-ins. 22 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build an image processing library: pixel manipulation, grayscale, blur, sharpen, resize, edge detection
queue.summary: Built image processing: grayscale, invert, brightness, contrast, blur, sharpen, edge detection, threshold, resize, flip. 18 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a binary serialization format: encode/decode objects to compact binary, schema definition, varint encoding
queue.summary: Built binary serialization: type-tagged, varint, zigzag encoding. Compact format. 19 tests. Published.

queue.task: Build a tiny web framework: route matching, middleware, JSON body parsing, static files, error handling
queue.summary: Built web framework: Express-like, routing, middleware, JSON parsing, error handling. Fully testable. 14 tests. Published.
